element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns overhead oblique perspective controls in opening stage
Collection-based progression; upgrades available throughout levels
Avoidance-based hazard; teaches spatial awareness in isometric view
Vertical hazard navigation; requires depth perception adaptation
Mechanical variation; likely introduces different level traversal patterns
Optional/additional combat challenges within level progression
Mandatory gate; escalates difficulty progression between stages
Interactive objects that aid alien combat; introduces puzzle-solving layer
Noted as difficult spike by retrospective critics; imprecise hit detection becomes pronounced
True final stage requires skill progression; acts as completion gate

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Frenetic; long levels with sustained action punctuated by narrative interludes; difficulty spikes notably at Stage 4

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Password system suggests hidden level routes or bonus content unlocks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Controlled introduction via Level 1; isometric perspective requires adjustment period but mechanics are accessible
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive increase; vehicle transitions and machine operations add tactical depth
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significant difficulty spike at Stage 4 (noted in retrospective reviews); imprecise hit detection and perspective-based targeting become critical friction points
notable_spikes: Stage 4: Explicitly cited as difficult; perspective-based hit detection becomes punitive
Final stage access: Requires skill mastery; acts as gatekeeping mechanism for true ending

notable_level_patterns.description: Long levels combining shooting, obstacle avoidance (mines/pitfalls), and vehicle navigation; sustained action with wave-based enemy encounters
Mid-level and end-level boss encounters serve as intensity gates; escalate learnings from preceding level sections
Story interludes between levels featuring protagonist's internal monologue; reduce pacing intensity and deepen character motivation
Notable increase in challenge; likely features denser hazard layouts or more aggressive enemy patterns; hit detection imprecision becomes design friction
